name: What if I was partly at fault in my work ladder fall?
description: Comp pays anyway; suits reduced by your % fault.[2]

mainEntity.name: What if I was partly at fault in my work ladder fall?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp pays anyway; suits reduced by your % fault.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Workers' comp pays regardless of your fault; third-party claims may reduce by your percentage under comparative negligence.[2]

Most states allow recovery if under 50-51% at fault; safety violations by others still liable.[1]

- Document employer lapses.
- Prove shared causes.
- No penalty in comp.

A lawyer argues minimal fault to preserve full value.[3] Don't admit blame early.
